edge_hypothesis: Supertrend direction flips produced PF=2.02 but only 16 trades (4 short of the 20-trade ACCEPT gate). The high ADX gate (25) filtered out valid trend-following signals in moderate-strength trends. By relaxing ADX from 25 to 15-20, the template should capture momentum shifts in moderate trends that are still directional enough for profitable supertrend signals. Combined with the proven wide-exit philosophy (3:1+ R:R) from the MACD ACCEPT, this should deliver both sufficient trade count AND fee-resistant PF. Regime assumption: TRENDING (ADX>15 includes moderate+strong trends). Invalidation: if PF < 1.0 with relaxed gates, the supertrend edge only exists in extreme trends and is not scalable.

variants.name: supertrend_relaxed_volume_boost
variants.description: Supertrend flip with ADX lowered to 15 to maximize trade count. The prior PF=2.02 result came from ADX>25 (16 trades). ADX>15 should double trade count by including moderate-strength trends. Standard 3:1 R:R to balance fee drag and win rate.
entry_long: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from <= 0 to > 0 (supertrend direction changes to bullish).
ADX_14 > 15 confirms at least moderate trend strength.
entry_short: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from >= 0 to < 0 (supertrend direction changes to bearish).
ADX_14 > 15 confirms at least moderate trend strength.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
Data required: ETH OHLCV on 4h and 1h
exit_rules: Exit long when SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips back to <= 0.
Exit short when SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips back to >= 0.
Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (3.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.0x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: low ADX gate may admit choppy signals that whipsaw
risk_rules: Stop loss at 1.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 3.0x ATR_14 from entry.

variants.name: supertrend_wide_exit_fee_killer
variants.description: Supertrend flip with ADX>18 and ultra-wide exits (3.5:1 R:R). Applies the fee-killer thesis validated by MACD PF=1.35: wider exits = fewer round-trips = lower fee drag per profit dollar. ADX>18 balances trade count vs signal quality.
entry_long: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from <= 0 to > 0 (supertrend direction changes to bullish).
entry_short: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from >= 0 to < 0 (supertrend direction changes to bearish).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
Data required: ETH OHLCV on 4h and 1h
exit_rules: Exit long when SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips back to <= 0.
Exit short when SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips back to >= 0.
Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (3.5x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.0x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: ultra-wide TP may rarely be hit in moderate trends
risk_rules: Stop loss at 1.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 3.5x ATR_14 from entry.

components.notes: supertrend_follow volatility gate — wide 3.5x ATR TP

variants.name: supertrend_dd_compression
variants.description: Supertrend flip with ADX>20 and tight DD cap (10%). Tests whether the PF=2.02 edge survives with tighter risk management. Moderate exits (2.5:1 R:R) for faster profit realization and lower drawdown. This variant prioritizes consistency over absolute PF.
entry_long: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from <= 0 to > 0 (supertrend direction changes to bullish).
entry_short: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from >= 0 to < 0 (supertrend direction changes to bearish).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
Data required: ETH OHLCV on 4h and 1h
exit_rules: Exit long when SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips back to <= 0.
Exit short when SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips back to >= 0.
Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (2.5x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.0x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: tighter TP may exit before supertrend trend completes
risk_rules: Stop loss at 1.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 2.5x ATR_14 from entry.

components.notes: supertrend_follow volatility gate — tight DD compression
